title: Deliciously Creamy Mexican Taleggio Quesadilla
description: A creamy and mustardy Mexican dish featuring taleggio, perfect for a flexitarian-friendly meal, this poached and kid-friendly veracruzan dish is sure to delight
instructions: Preheat a large skillet over medium heat with olive oil.
Add diced onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add poached chicken breast and cook until heated through.
In a bowl, mix together mexican crema, whole grain mustard, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Place a whole wheat tortilla in the skillet and sprinkle shredded cheese on half of the tortilla.
Add a spoonful of the crema mixture, some diced tomatoes, and a sprinkle of chopped cilantro on top of the cheese.
Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling.
Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the tortilla is crispy and the cheese is melted.
Flip the quesadilla and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until crispy and golden.
Repeat with remaining ingredients and serve hot.
